sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ عَادِلٌ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ دَرَّاجَةً جَدِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Adil je htio kupiti novi bicikl.
sentences.translationEn: Adil wanted to buy a new bicycle.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ سِعْرُ الدَّرَّاجَةِ كَبِيرًا بِالنِّسْبَةِ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Cijena bicikla je bila velika za njega.
sentences.translationEn: The price of the bicycle was too high for him.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ يَدَّخِرُ مِنْ مَصْرُوفِهِ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Počeo je štediti od džeparca svake sedmice.
sentences.translationEn: He started saving from his pocket money every week.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ ثَلَاثَةِ أَشْهُرٍ جَمَعَ المَبْلَغَ الكَافِيَ.
sentences.translation: Nakon tri mjeseca sakupio je dovoljan iznos.
sentences.translationEn: After three months he saved enough money.

sentences.translation: Kupio je bicikl i vozio ga s velikom radošću.
sentences.translationEn: He bought the bicycle and rode it with great joy.
